rationale: This skill builds frontend UIs (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue), so the agent will read existing project files and write component/page source files in typical web project locations. It references distinctive fonts and the Motion library, which implies linking to font CDNs (Google Fonts) and JS CDNs for assets. Node/npm/npx may be invoked to scaffold, install dependencies, or run dev servers for React/Vue projects, though pure HTML artifacts may need none. No deletions are implied by the skill's verbs.
